nation: Mohawks of the Bay of Quinte
one_time_description: Culbertson Tract Settlement - property held in trust recognized as financial asset
economic_notes: Government Business Enterprises include Loyalist Solar LP, Ernestown Windpark LP, Belleville Affordable Housing LP, Yaote ET Wind Inc., Yaote LS Solar Inc., 2821066 Ontario Inc., and Mohawk Golf Course Limited Partnership. Fibre to the Home operations noted. Culbertson Tract Settlement resulted in property held in trust.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (ended March 31, 2023). 2022 comparatives restated (Note 2). Culbertson Tract Settlement resulted in $32,994,452 liability and $5,255,820 property held in trust as financial asset - significant one-time item. Multiple GBEs accounted for by equity method: Loyalist Solar LP ($10,013,375), Ernestown Windpark LP ($3,600,000), Belleville Affordable Housing LP ($185,000). Long-term debt includes loans payable to Capital Fund/Operations Fund ($10,404,710), Yaote LS Solar Inc. ($13,849,310), and Yaote ET Wind Inc. ($5,811,279). Community Development Fund Under Administration ($3,416,432) and Funds held in trust - Culbertson Tract ($32,994,452) included in liabilities. Audit report dated July 12, 2024 - significantly delayed. Detailed program-level expenses available in supplementary statements but not individually extracted here.
